name: Maya Singh
bio: Gap year before med — I'm volunteering at a clinic and learning to sleep again. Want someone who thinks soup dumplings fix most problems.

name: Riley Thompson
bio: Art history + iced latte dependency. I'll narrate any painting like it's reality TV. Bonus if you can sprint a museum wing without guilt.

name: Zoe Martinez
bio: Field biologist — I smell like trail mix and sunscreen half the year. Looking for someone who won't flinch at a 5am hike pitch.

name: Ava Lindstrom
bio: Night-shift nurse new to days off that aren't just recovery naps. First date: daylight, caffeine, zero small talk about 'how tired' we are.

name: Chloe Bennett
bio: Left agency life for ceramics. My hands are always a little dusty. If you respect the kiln schedule, you respect me.

name: Priya Desai
bio: Product designer who still sketches on paper. I want a date where we redesign a bad menu together and tip well anyway.

name: Emma Walsh
bio: PhD candidate in econ — I chart feelings like they're time series. Seeking someone who laughs at my regression jokes.

name: Hannah Lee
bio: Returned to school for speech pathology after a decade in hospitality. I read lips at loud bars — it's a party trick and a coping skill.

name: Sofia Rossi
bio: Divorced, not damaged — coparenting a very opinionated cat. I cook loud Italian food and want someone who shows up hungry.

name: Jade Patterson
bio: D1 track — my calendar is splits and study hall. Cute if you can keep pace on an easy jog and pretend you're not dying.

name: Nina Alvarez
bio: First-gen STEM — I tutor calc to pay rent and stress-bake conchas. Date me if you can handle flour on the counter.

name: Lily Chen
bio: UX researcher who actually talks to users. I'll take notes on our banter. Red flag if you hate sticky notes.

name: Grace Okafor
bio: Corporate lawyer by day, Afrobeat dance classes by night. I need someone who doesn't ask why I'm still energetic at 10pm.

name: Violet Harper
bio: Photojournalism MFA — I shoot protests and farmers' markets with the same lens. Let's wander until the light gets honest.

name: Isla MacKenzie
bio: High school counselor — I've heard every excuse; yours better be creative. I kayak when I need to not fix anyone for an hour.

name: Mia Torres
bio: Two kids, one ex, zero drama — I run a bookkeeping side hustle and a tight ship. Looking for grown-up chemistry and bad puns.

name: Ella Brooks
bio: Chef-owner of a tiny brunch spot — I'm always tasting something. If you can't do Tuesday at 3pm, we won't work; that's my weekend.

name: Ruby Santos
bio: Paramedic — dark humor required, squeamish people kindly swipe past. I decompress with bad reality TV and good sourdough.

name: Clara Jensen
bio: Architect renovating a fixer-upper — dating me includes drywall dust and strong opinions about trim. I pay for pizza.

name: Naomi Park
bio: Career-switching into tech from publishing — I'm the oldest in the bootcamp and the calmest in a code review. Teach me your shortcuts.
